title: Government Computer Incident Response Center (AM-CERT) - cert.gov.am
description: Armenian government computer incident response center. National-agency cybersecurity site. No explicit post-quantum / quantum-safe cryptography reference found.

title: AM-CERT - National CERT/CSIRT Armenia
description: National Computer Emergency Response Team / CSIRT of Armenia, operating in partnership with the Armenian Government. TF-CSIRT accredited member. No explicit PQC content found.

title: Information Systems Agency of Armenia - Cybersecurity
description: Information Systems Agency of Armenia (ISAA), the body co-developing national cybersecurity policy and operating AM-CERT. No explicit post-quantum cryptography reference found.

title: Ministry of High-Tech Industry (Armenia)
description: Central executive body responsible for information security and cybersecurity policy in Armenia. Develops the unified cybersecurity legislative framework. No explicit PQC reference found.

title: Government Approves the Package of Draft Laws Including the Draft Law 'On Cybersecurity' - hightech.gov.am
description: Ministry of High-Tech Industry announcement on a draft cybersecurity law package. Addresses cybersecurity standards and critical information infrastructure but contains no explicit post-quantum / quantum-safe cryptography reference.

title: Government of the Republic of Armenia decision - on determining a cyber security strategy
description: Reference to the Government of Armenia's decision establishing a national Cyber Security Strategy. General cyber strategy; no indication it mentions post-quantum / quantum-safe cryptography. Hosted on a third-party (Digital Watch) domain, not an official Armenian government domain.

title: ՀՀ ազգային անվտանգության ռազմավարություն (Armenia National Security Strategy) - arlis.am
description: Armenia's National Security Strategy on the official Armenian legal information system (ARLIS). General national security document; no explicit post-quantum / quantum-safe cryptography content found.

title: CERT-AM (Internet Society of Armenia) - cert.am
description: Computer Security Incident Response Team operated by the (non-governmental) Internet Society of Armenia; manages the .AM TLD root. Non-governmental issuer. No explicit PQC reference found.
